accept: act mine [--json] lists issues where assignee == current node's effective identity (resolved from .act/config.json user.email or an explicit --as flag) AND status in {in_progress, blocked}.
act ready --mine filters the ready queue to issues already assigned to the current identity.
Both commands document the identity-resolution rule explicitly so agents can predict behavior across machines.
Output schema matches act list for act mine and act ready for act ready --mine (no new shape).
payload.description: An agent mid-task has no one-call way to ask 'what am I working on?' or 'what's next for me?'. It must construct act list --assignee=<self> --status=in_progress and know its own assignee string. act mine and act ready --mine resolve identity once. Originally specified at docs/issues/act-g004-gap.md.
payload.title: act mine and act ready --mine for self-scoped queries
